entries.definition:
l–b–b kernel, core, the edible inside of nuts and fruits; the
essence; heart, mind, reason; veins in the heart said to be the
source of kindness, amiable person, diligent person, upper part of
the chest. Of this root, only أَلْبَاب ʾalbāb occurs 22 times in the
Qur’an.

أَلْبَاب ʾalbāb [pl. of n. لُبّ lubb] cores, minds, discerning
faculties, reason, hearts, intellects (3:190) إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ
وَالْأَرْضِ truly, in the creation of the heavens and earth, and in the
alternation of night and day, are signs for those with
minds/reason.
